items.front: What must a controller do when a situation is not covered by this order?
Exercise best judgment when a situation is not covered by the order.
How long should the Explanation of Changes pages be retained?
items.back: Throughout the duration of the basic order.
Interpretation goes to AJV-P; clarification is returned to OSG for a written response to the requestor.
AJR: through channels to Systems Operations Services Director. Non-FAA/DoD: directly to AJV-P.

items.front: Where are LOA development, review, and approval procedures covered?
Who approves USAF procedures/minima that differ from the order and involve military aircraft only?
items.back: HQ Air Force Flight Standards Agency (per 1-1-11 note).

items.front: Which FAA order contains the ATO SMS direction?
Three ways to obtain ATO SMS info per 1-1-12.
items.back: Visit SMS Toolbox; email AJI at 9-AJI-SMS@faa.gov; contact service center Quality Control Group.

items.front: Two FAA centers receiving distribution of this order.
items.back: William J. Hughes Technical Center and Mike Monroney Aeronautical Center.
